name: rhino-mcp-platform
description: Desktop Connector for Rhino3d and Grasshopper
long_description: Bridges Claude to the Rhino MCP Platform plugin running inside Rhino. Requires the Rhino-MCP-Platform Rhino plugin to be installed via Rhino's PackageManager — the router binary that ships with the plugin is what this connector launches.

prompts.name: getting-started
prompts.description: Useful for your first time trying the Rhino3D claude desktop connector
